item.title: Definition of the terms used to describe psoriatic disease datasets: a HIPPOCRATES initiative.
item.description: Therapeutic advances in musculoskeletal disease - Psoriatic arthritis (PsA) is a complex, multisystem disease with no diagnostic criteria and discordant approaches to assessing disease activity and response to treatment. PsA is part of the Psoriat...

item.title: Univariate- and machine learning-based plasma metabolite signature differentiates PSC-IBD from IBD and is predicted to be driven by gut microbial changes.
item.description: Metabolomics : Official journal of the Metabolomic Society - Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) is a group of chronic inflammatory conditions of the gastrointestinal tract comprising two major phenotypes, Crohn's disease (CD) and ulcerative colitis (UC). Up to...

item.title: Gut-Brain Axis Dysregulation in Inflammatory Bowel Disease: Implications for Coagulation Abnormalities and Extraintestinal Manifestations.
item.description: International journal of general medicine - Review - Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) involves chronic intestinal inflammation driven by gut-brain axis imbalance, fostering complications through an "inflammation-neuro-coagulation" triad. Current stag...
